errors.conflict: You previously signed in with {provider}. Please sign in with {provider} to access your account, then connect additional providers from your account settings.
errors.default: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.AccountAlreadyLinked: This account is already linked to a different user.
errors.Configuration: A configuration error occurred. Please contact support if this persists.
errors.AccessDenied: Access was denied. Please try again or contact support.
errors.Verification: The sign-in link has expired or already been used.
errors.OAuthCallback: Something went wrong during sign-in. Please try again.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.name: Name
Dashboard.nextStepsDesc: Your authentication layer is fully functional. The user ID is available in the session, and your profile has been lazily created in the database.

Settings.title: Account Settings
Settings.subtitle: Manage the sign-in methods connected to your CVPilot account.
Settings.infoNote: Connected accounts allow you to sign in using any of the linked methods. Your profile information will not be changed when adding a new sign-in method.

messages.AccountAlreadyLinked: This account is already linked to a different user.
messages.alreadyConnected: This provider is already connected to your account.

Hero.titleLine2: more interviews with an ATS-optimized resume.
Hero.description: Get your ATS score diagnostic instantly. Our solution analyzes the structure, keywords and content of your profile to pass recruiter filters.

Stats.atsCompatibility: CERTIFIED COMPATIBILITY WITH LEADING APPLICANT TRACKING SYSTEMS (ATS)

FeatureKeywords.title: Real-time keyword gap analysis
FeatureKeywords.description: Recruiting algorithms filter applications based on precise criteria. Our tool compares your resume with the target job description to instantly identify missing technical and methodological skills.
FeatureKeywords.bullet1: Direct semantic extraction from the job description
FeatureKeywords.bullet2: Compliance diagnostic and ATS matching score
FeatureKeywords.bullet3: Guided recommendations to close the gaps
FeatureKeywords.analyzingDesc: Scanning required keywords and comparing with your professional history...
FeatureKeywords.correctionDesc: Add the term "GraphQL" in the Projects section (e.g. Dashboard project) to increase relevance by +13%.

FeatureRewriting.title: Highlighting impact and results
FeatureRewriting.description: Recruiters look for concrete accomplishments, not lists of passive tasks. Our module structures your experiences using the STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result) integrating performance indicators.
FeatureRewriting.beforeText: "I was responsible for developing the application and leading the technical team to fix bugs."
FeatureRewriting.afterText: "Led a team of 5 developers and delivered a SaaS application in Next.js, reducing load times by 40% and bug rate by 25%."

FeatureTemplates.title: Recruiter-approved resume templates
FeatureTemplates.description: Clean resume structures, tested by our engineers and designed to be 100% parsed by all ATS systems on the market (Workday, Taleo, Greenhouse).
FeatureTemplates.template1Desc: Clean single-column structure, ideal for finance, consulting and leadership roles.
FeatureTemplates.template2Desc: Optimized to showcase language mastery, system architecture and technical projects.
FeatureTemplates.template3Desc: Perfect balance with lateral column for marketing, sales and operations profiles.

Workflow.title: The science of recruiting, automated.
Workflow.description: Discover how our artificial intelligence engine analyzes, calibrates and rewrites your profile to transform it into a priority application.
Workflow.phase1Desc: Our engine deconstructs your resume to identify formatting gaps and evaluate its readability by recruiting algorithms.
Workflow.phase2Desc: Instant semantic comparison between your experience and the technical requirements of the target position to ensure keyword alignment.
Workflow.phase3Desc: Restructuring your accomplishments into quantified, impact-oriented statements, maximizing your interview conversion rate.
Workflow.quantification: Result quantification (+40%) and TypeScript added for ATS.
Workflow.passiveDesc: • Helped clients develop web applications and resolve technical bugs on time.
Workflow.alignedDesc1: • Helped clients develop React applications and resolve bugs on time.
Workflow.optimizedDesc: • Deployed 12 apps in React and TypeScript, optimizing performance by 40%.

Pricing.title: Boost your interview chances
Pricing.description: Start for free, then level up to maximize your applications.
Pricing.freeDesc: To analyze your current resume and discover your initial ATS score.
Pricing.premiumDesc: The complete arsenal to perfectly align your profile with recruiter criteria.

FinalCta.title: Ready to pass the recruitment filters?
FinalCta.description: Get your ATS score diagnostic instantly and align your skills with recruiter standards to land your next interview.

Footer.tagline: The leading AI-powered resume optimization platform. Align your skills with recruiter standards and maximize your chances of getting interviews.
Footer.copyright: © 2026 PROCV. All rights reserved. Professional ATS Optimization.

Builder.personalInfoDesc: Tell employers who you are and how they can contact you.
Builder.summaryDesc: A brief overview of your professional background and key achievements.
Builder.experienceDesc: Highlight your past roles, responsibilities, and impact.
Builder.educationDesc: List your academic background and degrees.
Builder.skillsDesc: Showcase your technical and soft skills.
Builder.languagesDesc: List the languages you speak and your proficiency.
Builder.certificationsDesc: Include relevant certifications to boost credibility.
Builder.projectsDesc: Showcase personal or professional projects to demonstrate your abilities.
Builder.interestsDesc: Add a few personal interests to round out your profile.
Builder.pageOverflowWarning: Your resume now spans 2 pages. Recruiters generally prefer a single-page resume — try trimming some content.
Builder.finalizeDesc: Add optional sections and review your resume.
